title: mentha pseudovalis
intro: Mentha pseudovalis, also known as Japanese peppermint, is a hybrid of watermint and spearmint, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive-aiding effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of mentha pseudovalis include relief from nausea, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Mentha pseudovalis can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy, culinary applications, and traditional medicine.
